# Catalog (generated — do not edit)

Inventory of `plugins/core/`, generated by [`scripts/gen-catalog.sh`](scripts/gen-catalog.sh).
The source files are canonical; this is a projection. Re-run the generator after adding or
removing a rule, skill, command, or hook. CI ([`.github/workflows/freshness.yml`](../../.github/workflows/freshness.yml))
fails a push if this file is out of date. Do not hand-edit.

## Global rules (always loaded, lean)

- **Anti-staleness (single source of truth)** — `rules/global/anti-stale.md`
- **Knowledge capture** — `rules/global/knowledge-capture.md`
- **Naming discipline (language-independent)** — `rules/global/naming-discipline.md`
- **Secrets are references, never values** — `rules/global/secrets-as-references.md`
- **Speed by default** — `rules/global/speed-by-default.md`
- **Verify before asserting** — `rules/global/verify-before-asserting.md`
- **Working style** — `rules/global/working-style.md`

## Rule modules (composed per project by `/new-project`)

### activity

| Module | Scope (paths) | Title |
|---|---|---|
| `activity/data-modeling` | all files (on-demand) | Data modeling work |
| `activity/etl-pipeline` | all files (on-demand) | ETL pipeline work |
| `activity/policy-procedure` | all files (on-demand) | Policy / procedure writing |
| `activity/web-tool` | all files (on-demand) | Web tool work |

### coding

| Module | Scope (paths) | Title |
|---|---|---|
| `coding/design-defaults` | all files (on-demand) | Design defaults |
| `coding/error-handling` | all files (on-demand) | Error handling |
| `coding/input-validation` | all files (on-demand) | Input validation at boundaries |

### context

| Module | Scope (paths) | Title |
|---|---|---|
| `context/personal` | all files (on-demand) | Personal context (sports / learning) |
| `context/work` | all files (on-demand) | Work context (1st Lake) |

### lang

| Module | Scope (paths) | Title |
|---|---|---|
| `lang/env-vars` | **/.env*, **/*.env, **/.github/workflows/*.{yml,yaml} | Environment variables |
| `lang/git` | all files (on-demand) | Git conventions |
| `lang/github-actions` | **/.github/workflows/*.{yml,yaml} | GitHub Actions |
| `lang/power-query-m` | **/*.{pq,m} | Power Query M naming |
| `lang/python` | **/*.py | Python naming (PEP 8) |
| `lang/sql-server` | **/*.sql | SQL Server (T-SQL) naming |
| `lang/typescript` | **/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,mjs,cjs} | JavaScript / TypeScript naming |

### tool

| Module | Scope (paths) | Title |
|---|---|---|
| `tool/appfolio` | all files (on-demand) | AppFolio |

### reference-only (not composed into projects)

- `rules/modules/lang/_reference-why-naming-differs.md` — Why the naming rules differ (reference)

## Presets

Named module lists applied in one choice by `/new-project`. Canonical source:
[`rules/presets/presets.md`](rules/presets/presets.md).

## Skills

- **merge-with-discretion** — Use ONLY when a non-main branch exists (one created earlier with explicit owner approval) and it is time to decide whether and when to integrate it — e.g. …
- **session-hygiene** — Use on surfaces WITHOUT hooks (claude.ai web/chat, iPhone, Cowork until verified) to run the must-happen session procedures that Claude Code does automatically …
- **surface-check** — Use when the user asks "what's loaded here", "what can this surface do", "is my memory/rules/connector active", "why doesn't X work here", or when starting …

## Commands

- **/new-project** — Compose a project's rule set from the gallery (preset + free pick) and write its CLAUDE.md

## Hooks

Scripts in `hooks/`, wired to events in [`hooks/hooks.json`](hooks/hooks.json)
(plugin delivery) and the repo's `.claude/settings.json` (dev-time dogfood).

- **session-end-backup.sh** — claude-kit end-of-session write, deterministic half (PLAN.md 5.4 / 7.2).
- **session-start-gate.sh** — claude-kit SessionStart freshness + git gate (PLAN.md 5.3 / 7.2).
- **session-stop-push-gate.sh** — claude-kit Stop gate: never leave unpushed commits

## Agents

None yet.
